title: Samsung workers rally in S. Korea
description: PYEONGTAEK, South Korea -- Thousands of Samsung Electronics workers rallied Thursday at its computer chip complex in Pyeongtaek, South Korea, demanding higher bonuses and threatening to strike as booming demand for artificial intelligence drives up memory-chip profits.

title: The AI Revolution: How China is Transforming the Future of Electric Vehicles
description: China is advancing its electric vehicle market by integrating artificial intelligence, turning cars into self-reasoning machines. Various companies, including Xpeng, Xiaomi, and Huawei, are contributing to this transformation with investments and technological innovations, showcasing China's commitment to revolutionizing the global car industry.

title: Lightelligence Is Said Set to Price HK IPO at Top of Range

title: Trump administration vows crackdown on Chinese companies 'exploiting' AI models made in US
description: The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies' exploitation of US artificial intelligence models, singling out China at a time that country is narrowing the gap with the US in the AI race.
content:
WASHINGTON: The Trump administration is vowing to crack down on foreign tech companies' exploitation of US artificial intelligence models, singling out China at a time that country is narrowing the gap with the US in the AI race.

title: India's IT model worked, until AI. Disruption now haunts its sub-optimal equilibrium
description: India's IT sector thrived for decades by providing skilled labour at lower costs. This model is now challenged by Artificial Intelligence. AI is eroding the advantages of offshore services and complex task execution. India must now focus on innovation to build foundational technologies and secure its future in the global AI landscape. The old strategy is no longer sufficient.
content:

title: When your wife asks ChatGPT instead of you
description: A husband reflects on his wife’s growing reliance on artificial intelligence
content:
